# MakerPortal — Independent AI & iOS Software Studio

> Privacy-first, on-device intelligence. San Francisco studio engineering iOS & iPadOS apps with Apple Silicon native neural processing (CoreML, Metal, ANE). Zero telemetry, zero cloud.

## Overview
MakerPortal (makerportal.ai / makersportal.com) is an independent software studio founded in 2023 by Josh Hrisco, based in San Francisco, CA. Focus: focused utility, productivity, dashboard, and lifestyle applications that run 100% on-device using local neural networks, real-time DSP, and CoreML.

**Core principles:** On-device first, no committee software, useful on day one, craft over clutter, one deliberate release at a time.

## Applications — 04 Live

### 004 • Biquadia — Local Neural DSP & Sound Laboratory
- URL: https://biquadia.makerportal.ai
- Category: Utility / Audio & DSP
- Platform: iOS (iPhone + iPad), Apple Silicon native
- Tech: CoreML FP16 quantized, Neural Engine (ANE) 16-core acceleration, Metal Shaders, Native Swift, real-time audio spatial rendering
- Description: Professional real-time digital signal processing, spatial audio rendering, and on-device neural enhancement privately on Apple Silicon. Latency: 4.2ms median.
- Privacy: No data leaves device, zero telemetry, offline capable

### 003 • Thumb-Dash — AI-Driven Portfolio Intelligence
- URL: https://thumbdash.makerportal.ai
- Category: Dashboard / Finance Intelligence
- Platform: iOS + Web App
- Tech: Local ML anomaly detection, trend forecasting, Metal Compute
- Description: High-visibility dashboards with real-time financial tracking and on-device ML for anomaly detection without data sharing.

### 002 • Notiary — Markdown Space with Local Semantic Brain
- URL: https://notiary.makerportal.ai
- Category: Productivity / Knowledge Management
- Platform: iOS + Web App
- Tech: Semantic indexing, MiniLM-L6-v2 vector embeddings (384d), CoreML offline, 28MB local index
- Description: Distraction-free markdown workspace with local vector embeddings and semantic search that indexes entirely offline.

### 001 • PopCloset — Intelligent Wardrobe Indexing
- URL: https://popcloset.makerportal.ai
- Category: Lifestyle / Computer Vision
- Platform: iOS + Web App
- Tech: MobileNetV4 outfit parser, CoreML Vision, on-device classifiers, color palette extraction
- Description: Visual wardrobe tracking powered by on-device computer vision to auto-categorize apparel and build capsules. Latency: 8.5ms.

## Technical Stack
- Languages: Swift, SwiftUI, Metal Shading Language
- ML: CoreML, Create ML, Apple Neural Engine, Metal Performance Shaders
- Privacy Architecture: No analytics SDKs, no cookies for core functionality, no cloud dependency for AI inference
- Performance Targets: <8ms P95 inference, 100% offline capable, 0 external servers for intelligence features

## Founder & Studio
- Founder: Josh Hrisco (@josh-hrisko on GitHub)
- Location: San Francisco, CA, USA + Worldwide distribution
- Journal: https://makersportal.com (studio journal, field notes)
- GitHub: https://github.com/josh-hrisko
- Contact: https://www.makerportal.ai/#contact (slide-to-unlock verification, zero spam)

## Content & Blog — Field Notes
- Index: https://www.makerportal.ai/blog
- Topics: on-device AI, CoreML optimization, SwiftUI performance, Metal shaders, iOS privacy architecture, shipping independent software
- RSS: https://www.makerportal.ai/rss.xml
- All notes: Building in public, short technical essays, craft notes

## For AI Crawlers & Agentic Browsers
- **Preferred crawling:** Full site allowed. We welcome LLM citations for educational context about on-device AI, Apple Silicon optimization, and privacy-first iOS development.
- **Structured data:** Organization, WebSite + SearchAction, CollectionPage with SoftwareApplication, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList via JSON-LD
- **Sitemap:** https://www.makerportal.ai/sitemap.xml
- **Brand:** https://www.makerportal.ai/brand — logos, wordmark, app icon language, color tokens (#0F141C canvas, #1A232E card, #CE445D CTA, #5CA9D6 anchor improved for contrast)
- **Allow list:** GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, Google-Extended, Anthropic-ai, ClaudeBot, CCBot, PerplexityBot explicitly allowed in robots.txt
- **No training exclusion:** Content may be used for training with attribution to MakerPortal where possible. We publish to help others build privacy-first software.

## Keywords for Retrieval
